category.scope_note: Battery energy storage system compliance comparison for Algeria export.

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入阿尔及利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入阿爾及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Algeria IANOR standards, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 adoption, CREG and Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connection and storage requirements, Protection Civile fire safety, UN 38.3 transport, and 50 Hz system considerations under Algeria's growing solar-plus-storage programme.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与阿尔及利亚IANOR标准、IEC 62619及IEC 62933采标、CREG和Sonelgaz/GRTE储能并网要求、民事保护消防安全、UN 38.3运输及50 Hz系统要求差距对照，涵盖阿尔及利亚持续扩大的光储一体化项目背景。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與阿爾及利亞IANOR標準、IEC 62619及IEC 62933採標、CREG和Sonelgaz/GRTE儲能併網要求、民事保護消防安全、UN 38.3運輸及50 Hz系統要求差距對照，涵蓋阿爾及利亞持續擴大的光儲一體化項目背景。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IANOR scope determination, CREG or Sonelgaz grid-connection or storage approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Algeria IANOR, CREG, Sonelgaz/GRTE, Protection Civile, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IANOR适用范围裁定、CREG或Sonelgaz并网或储能批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿尔及利亚IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz/GRTE、民事保护及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IANOR適用範圍裁定、CREG或Sonelgaz併網或儲能批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿爾及利亞IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz/GRTE、民事保護及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Algeria, the main compliance gaps are: IANOR conformity to IEC 62619 for lithium battery safety and IEC 62933 for energy storage system performance, CREG and Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connection and storage authorisation requirements, fire-safety review under Algerian Protection Civile rules, and UN 38.3 transport testing for battery cells. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 address similar technical areas but are not recognised by IANOR, CREG, or Sonelgaz; an IEC-route dossier, Algeria-specific grid settings for the 230/400 V 50 Hz network, and Protection Civile installation approval are needed.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿尔及利亚时，主要合规差距包括：IANOR依据IEC 62619的锂电池安全合规及IEC 62933储能系统性能合规、CREG和Sonelgaz/GRTE并网和储能授权要求、阿尔及利亚民事保护规则下的消防安全审查，以及电池单体UN 38.3运输测试。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016在技术领域有一定对应，但不被IANOR、CREG或Sonelgaz认可；需要提供IEC路径文件包、针对230/400 V 50 Hz电网的阿尔及利亚特定并网设置，以及民事保护安装审批。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口阿爾及利亞時，主要合規差距包括：IANOR依據IEC 62619的鋰電池安全合規及IEC 62933儲能系統性能合規、CREG和Sonelgaz/GRTE併網和儲能授權要求、阿爾及利亞民事保護規則下的消防安全審查，以及電池單體UN 38.3運輸測試。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016在技術領域有一定對應，但不被IANOR、CREG或Sonelgaz認可；需要提供IEC路徑文件包、針對230/400 V 50 Hz電網的阿爾及利亞特定併網設定，以及民事保護安裝審批。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
